probes.name: coaching-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms coaching_profiles + coach_assignments + coach_certifications + coach_skill_ratings tables + every partial unique index exists.

probes.name: coaching-head-coach-invariant-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index on coach_assignments (tenant_id, assignable_type, assignable_id, role='head_coach', deleted_at IS NULL). Without it, concurrent head_coach assignments could both succeed.

probes.name: coaching-unique-profile-per-staff-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index on coaching_profiles (tenant_id, staff_id, deleted_at IS NULL). Enforces one active profile per Staff.

probes.name: coaching-head-coach-invariant-clean
probes.description: Runs SELECT (tenant_id, assignable_type, assignable_id) FROM coach_assignments WHERE role='head_coach' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > NOW()) GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1. Any finding is a P1 signal.

probes.name: coaching-orphan-assignment-detection
probes.description: Detects active CoachAssignment rows referencing a coaching_profile_id whose profile is is_active=false OR verified_by_admin_at IS NULL. Fires P1 — indicates a cascade failure.

probes.name: coaching-certification-expiration-backlog
probes.description: Count of certifications past expires_at that have NOT fired CoachCertificationExpired (metric-hydration gap). Elevated indicates NotifyCertificationExpiredJob stalled.

probes.name: coaching-verification-backlog
probes.description: Count of CoachingProfile rows unverified > 7 days after creation. Elevated indicates admin verification queue backlog.

probes.name: coaching-availability-conflict-rate
probes.description: Percentage of new assignments whose AssignmentConflictDetector fires the soft-warn. Elevated indicates scheduling process gaps.

probes.name: coaching-slot-usage-ratio
probes.description: Per-tenant ratio of active_profiles / coaching_profile_slot. Elevated (> 0.85) indicates tenant approaching cap — upsell signal.
